recommendations.title: Happily Ever After
recommendations.overview: Is love compatible with coupledom? And what of freedom and fidelity? These are some of the questions facing two married men.

recommendations.title: Le Brio
recommendations.overview: After an incident, a brilliant professor known for his outbursts is forced to mentor the student he wronged for a speech contest.

recommendations.title: The Accusation
recommendations.overview: The Farels are a power couple: Jean is a prominent French pundit and his wife Claire an essayist known for her radical feminism. Together they have a model son, Alexandre, who is a student at a prestigious American university. During a brief visit to

recommendations.title: My Dog Stupid
recommendations.overview: Henri is a middle-aged writer with fading inspiration who has published nothing worthy of note in years. Feeling increasingly misunderstood by his wife and four grown up deadbeat kids, he dreams of running away to start over again. Yet when he discov

recommendations.title: The Diary of Anne Frank
recommendations.overview: The story of Anne Frank, the Jewish girl who went into hiding with her family in Amsterdam and became a victim of the Holocaust.

recommendations.title: One Life
recommendations.overview: British stockbroker Nicholas Winton visits Czechoslovakia in the 1930s and forms plans to assist in the rescue of Jewish children before the onset of World War II, in an operation that came to be known as the Kindertransport.

recommendations.title: More the Merrier
recommendations.overview: Multiple stories about the oscillating world of couple relationships and how difficult it can be to separate sex from love.

recommendations.title: The Courageous Heart of Irena Sendler
recommendations.overview: Irena Sendler is a Catholic social worker who has sympathized with the Jews since her childhood, when her physician father died of typhus contracted while treating poor Jewish patients. When she initially proposes saving Jewish children from the Wars

recommendations.title: Everything Is Illuminated
recommendations.overview: A young Jewish American man endeavors—with the help of eccentric, distant relatives—to find the woman who saved his grandfather during World War II—in a Ukrainian village which was ultimately razed by the Nazis.

recommendations.title: Facing Windows
recommendations.overview: Overburdened and stuck in a greying marriage, Giovanna takes to caring for a Jewish Holocaust survivor her husband brings home. As she begins to reflect on her life, she turns to the man who lives across from her.
